title: zehneria marginata
intro: Zehneria marginata, also known as the Indian pennywort or gotu kola, is a type of flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to improve blood circulation and boost the immune system. The health benefits of Zehneria marginata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, or capsules, and can also be applied topically as a paste or ointment.
